Consumer products maker Unilever NV agreed to buy beauty products maker Alberto Culver Co. for $3.7 billion.
Craig Allen Jameson and John Joseph Masotta own Parallax Associates, a growing architecture firm in Culver City, Calif.
Other collaborations include limited edition products with Valerie Confections, Heath Ceramics and Culver City boxmakers Morera.
